## Skill: `cross-cutting-change-mgmt`

**Type:** META-CONCEPT (cross-pane changes cần routing khác giữa frameworks)
**Cần:** `references/terminology-map.md` + `references/philosophy.md`

**Đọc tham khảo (KHÔNG copy):**
- `.opencode/skills/hm-l2-cross-cutting-change/SKILL.md` — hiện tại (healthiest W4)
- `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/23-W4-SYNTHESIS.md`

**Tạo mới:** `.opencode/skills/cross-cutting-change-mgmt/SKILL.md`

**Nội dung cốt lõi:**
- Cross-pane impact analysis: test layer + interface + deep module
- Dependency ordering: test first, then interface, then deep module
- Consumer impact tracing
- Framework-agnostic body

**References:**
- `references/terminology-map.md` — cross-cutting concepts across GSD/BMAD/Hivemind
- `references/philosophy.md` — why ordered, test-first change management

**Check conflict:** KO chồng lấn với user-intent-patterns (change mgmt ≠ intent extraction). KO chồng với multi-agent-coordination (single change ≠ multi-agent dispatch).

Commit. `## SKILL cross-cutting-change-mgmt COMPLETE`.
